# Structure

*Generated by codebase mapper — architecture focus*

## Repository Layout

```
refactor-agent/
├── apps/
│   ├── backend/                    # Python backend (main application)
│   │   ├── src/refactor_agent/     # All application code
│   │   ├── tests/                  # pytest test suite
│   │   ├── scripts/                # CLI helper scripts
│   │   └── pyproject.toml          # Python project config (deps, mypy, ruff)
│   ├── dashboard/                  # React/TypeScript dashboard app
│   ├── site/                       # Marketing site
│   └── vscode-extension/           # VS Code extension (TypeScript)
├── packages/
│   ├── design-system/              # Shared React component library
│   └── ts-morph-bridge/            # TypeScript refactor engine (Node.js)
├── infra/                          # Terraform (GCP)
│   ├── shared/                     # Firestore, secrets, IAM
│   ├── a2a/                        # Cloud Run for A2A server
│   └── chainlit/                   # Cloud Run for Chainlit (optional)
├── playground/                     # Local test workspace for refactoring
├── docs/                           # Documentation
│   ├── clients/                    # MCP, A2A client setup guides
│   └── infra/                      # Credential rotation, deployment
├── .cursor/                        # Cursor IDE config
│   ├── mcp.json                    # MCP server config
│   └── rules/*.mdc                 # Cursor coding rules (mirrors CLAUDE.md)
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml             # pnpm monorepo config
├── Makefile                        # Dev commands
└── CLAUDE.md                       # Coding guidelines (authoritative)
```

## Backend Source Layout

```
apps/backend/src/refactor_agent/
├── _log_config.py          # Structured logging setup (call once at startup)
├── config.py               # Global settings (model, timeouts, AGENT_VERSION)
├── llm_client.py           # AsyncAnthropic factory (direct or LiteLLM proxy)
│
├── orchestrator/           # Main agent — used by UI, A2A, CI
│   ├── agent.py            # create_orchestrator_agent() + all tools
│   ├── deps.py             # OrchestratorDeps, NeedInput
│   └── runner.py           # run_orchestrator()
│
├── agentic/                # AGENT_V2 pipeline (feature-flagged)
│   ├── router.py           # Layer 1: intent routing
│   ├── triage.py           # Layer 2: classification + ScopeSpec
│   ├── validator.py        # ScopeSpec + dry-run validation
│   ├── feedback.py         # Post-run Qdrant hook (stub)
│   └── runner.py           # Pipeline orchestration
│
├── schedule/               # RefactorSchedule: models, planning, execution
│   ├── models.py           # RefactorSchedule, ScopeSpec, all Op types
│   ├── planner.py          # create_planner_agent() + run_planner()
│   ├── executor.py         # execute_schedule() with toposort
│   ├── codebase_structure.py  # build_codebase_structure() for LLM context
│   └── limits.py           # Budget constants
│
├── engine/                 # Code transformation backends
│   ├── base.py             # RefactorEngine, ProjectEngine protocols
│   ├── registry.py         # EngineRegistry.create(language, source)
│   ├── python/
│   │   └── libcst_engine.py   # Single-file Python transforms
│   └── typescript/
│       └── ts_morph_engine.py # Full-project TypeScript transforms
│
├── a2a/                    # Agent-to-Agent HTTP server
│   ├── server.py           # build_app() → A2AStarletteApplication
│   ├── executor.py         # ASTRefactorAgentExecutor (request handler)
│   ├── models.py           # A2A request/response payloads
│   └── bridge.py           # BridgeCompatibleRequestHandler
│
├── ui/                     # Chainlit chat interface
│   ├── app.py              # @cl decorators, workflow modes
│   └── chat_agent.py       # Chat agent integration
│
├── sync/                   # WebSocket replica sync
│   ├── server.py           # WebSocket server + file sync protocol
│   └── client.py           # Client library for VS Code extension
│
├── mcp/                    # Model Context Protocol server
│   └── server.py           # FastMCP: rename_symbol tool
│
├── ci/                     # CI/CD preset runner
│   ├── __main__.py         # Entry point
│   ├── runner.py           # run_ci() — preset loop
│   ├── config.py           # Preset resolution from YAML
│   └── report.py           # CiReport output
│
├── agent/                  # Legacy single-file AST agent
│   └── factory.py          # create_ast_refactor_agent()
│
├── auth/                   # Firebase/GitHub OAuth
├── observability/
│   └── langfuse_config.py  # get_prompt(), langfuse_span()
└── models/
    └── prompt_config.py    # PromptConfig (Langfuse integration)
```

## Key File Locations

| What you need | Where to look |
|---------------|---------------|
| Agent definitions | `orchestrator/agent.py`, `agentic/router.py`, `agentic/triage.py`, `schedule/planner.py` |
| Op types / schedule models | `schedule/models.py` |
| Engine protocols | `engine/base.py` |
| TypeScript engine | `packages/ts-morph-bridge/` + `engine/typescript/ts_morph_engine.py` |
| Python engine | `engine/python/libcst_engine.py` |
| MCP tools | `mcp/server.py` |
| Global config | `config.py` |
| Logging setup | `_log_config.py` |
| Dev commands | `Makefile` |
| Coding rules | `CLAUDE.md` (authoritative), `.cursor/rules/*.mdc` (mirror) |

## Naming Conventions

- **Packages:** `snake_case` directories with `__init__.py`
- **Modules:** `snake_case.py` — named for their role (`runner.py`, `executor.py`, `factory.py`)
- **Classes:** `PascalCase` — `OrchestratorDeps`, `RefactorSchedule`, `LibCSTEngine`
- **Constants:** `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` — `MAX_PLANNER_LLM_ROUNDS`, `AGENT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT`
- **Agent factories:** `create_<name>_agent()` pattern throughout
- **Loggers:** each package has `<package>/logger.py` exporting `logger`
- **Tests:** `tests/test_<module>/test_<function>.py`

## Where to Add New Code

| Adding... | Put it in... |
|-----------|--------------|
| New MCP tool | `mcp/server.py` — add `@mcp.tool()` function |
| New op type | `schedule/models.py` — add to union; `schedule/executor.py` — add handler |
| New language engine | `engine/<language>/` — implement `ProjectEngine` protocol; register in `engine/registry.py` |
| New agent | `<domain>/` package — follow `create_<name>_agent()` factory pattern |
| New A2A endpoint | `a2a/executor.py` — add to `ASTRefactorAgentExecutor` |
| New CI preset type | `ci/config.py` — extend preset resolution |

---
